title: Red Age Unit Type Schema (v4.32)
description: Schema for unit type definitions (UnitType). NOT match units state — see match.schema units[].

unit_type_id.description: Unique identifier for this unit type (matches match.schema unit_type_id).

name.description: Display name of the unit type.

domain.description: Movement domain: ground, naval, or air.

base_max_hp.description: Maximum HP for units of this type.

ap_cost.description: Action points cost to produce this unit.

sight.description: Visibility range. Optional; defaults by range if omitted.

is_unique.description: If true, faction-unique unit (one per faction).

unlock_tech.description: Tech branch+level required to unlock (e.g. MILITARY_L4), or null if base.
